data.title: Implement archive-on-consume and retention pruning in retro-gather.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Implements the lifecycle policy for .suggestions/ records selected by approach-decision-maker: archive-on-consume with configurable retention limit. After retro synthesis, processed suggestion files are moved to .suggestions/archive/ on the tickets orphan branch. Archive entries older than suggestion.archive_retain_days (default 90) are pruned.

External dependencies (must be complete before this task):
- Story 8d1b-0d04: provides .suggestions/ schema and suggestion-record.sh
- Story 434c-ca05: provides the synthesis section in retro-gather.sh that this task extends

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Add archive step to retro-gather.sh (after SUGGESTION_DATA synthesis section from story 434c-ca05)

```bash
TRACKER_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.tickets-tracker"

# Graceful degradation: skip if .suggestions/ absent or empty
if [ ! -d "$TRACKER_DIR/.suggestions" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A "$TRACKER_DIR/.suggestions"/*.json 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
    : # no-op
else
    # Acquire Python fcntl.flock on .ticket-write.lock (30s timeout, 2 retries per ticket-flock-contract.md)
    python3 -c "
import fcntl, os, time
lock_path = '$TRACKER_DIR/.ticket-write.lock'
fd = os.open(lock_path, os.O_CREAT | os.O_RDWR)
deadline = time.monotonic() + 30
while time.monotonic() < deadline:
    try: fcntl.flock(fd, fcntl.LOCK_EX | fcntl.LOCK_NB); break
    except (IOError, OSError): time.sleep(0.1)
os.close(fd)
" 2>/dev/null || true  # fail-open if flock unavailable

    # Ensure archive directory exists
    mkdir -p "$TRACKER_DIR/.suggestions/archive"

    # Archive each processed .suggestions/*.json
    for f in "$TRACKER_DIR/.suggestions"/*.json; do
        [ -f "$f" ] || continue
        git -C "$TRACKER_DIR" mv ".suggestions/$(basename "$f")" ".suggestions/archive/$(basename "$f")" 2>/dev/null || true
    done
    git -C "$TRACKER_DIR" commit -q -m "suggestions: archive after retro synthesis" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
```

### 2. Add retention pruning step (after archive step)

```bash
# Read config: suggestion.archive_retain_days (default 90)
RETAIN_DAYS=$(bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/read-config.sh" suggestion.archive_retain_days 2>/dev/null || echo "90")
RETAIN_DAYS="${RETAIN_DAYS:-90}"
CUTOFF=$(date -d "$RETAIN_DAYS days ago" +%s 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "import time; print(int(time.time() - $RETAIN_DAYS * 86400))")

pruned=0
for f in "$TRACKER_DIR/.suggestions/archive"/*.json 2>/dev/null; do
    [ -f "$f" ] || continue
    FILE_TS=$(stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    if [ "$FILE_TS" -lt "$CUTOFF" ]; then
        git -C "$TRACKER_DIR" rm -q ".suggestions/archive/$(basename "$f")" 2>/dev/null || true
        pruned=$((pruned + 1))
    fi
done
if [ "$pruned" -gt 0 ]; then
    git -C "$TRACKER_DIR" commit -q -m "suggestions: prune ${pruned} archive entries older than ${RETAIN_DAYS} days" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
```

### 3. Add config key to .claude/dso-config.conf
Add: `suggestion.archive_retain_days = 90`

## File Impact
| File | Action | Test classification |
|------|--------|---------------------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/retro-gather.sh | modify (add archive + prune sections) | UPDATE |
| .claude/dso-config.conf | modify (add config key) | still-valid (config wiring) |

## E2E Rationale
Not required: .tickets-tracker/ is a flat-file orphan branch store. Unit tests with a mock tracker directory provide sufficient behavioral coverage. No network layer or multi-process boundary requires end-to-end testing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] All 4 test cases from task 9430-bc97 pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-retro-gather.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
- [ ] retro-gather.sh runs without error when .suggestions/ is absent
  Verify: TRACKER_DIR=$(mktemp -d) bash -c 'source plugins/dso/scripts/retro-gather.sh --dry-run 2>&1; test $? -eq 0'
- [ ] suggestion.archive_retain_days = 90 present in .claude/dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q "suggestion.archive_retain_days" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] git || true guards prevent set -euo pipefail abort on empty commit
  Verify: code inspection — both git commit lines end with || true
